reviewLimitations.limitation: No PPW claim-promotion gate review has been completed for any Lincoln draft claims
reviewLimitations.impact: Draft claims from this module cannot advance beyond source-review status until gate review is initiated (Milestone 16)
reviewLimitations.resumeCondition: Milestone 16 claim import and gate framework

reviewLimitations.limitation: Inter-annotator agreement metrics exist only in child repo (Stage 4H/4J records)
reviewLimitations.impact: PPW cannot verify reliability score independently; must reference child-repo records
reviewLimitations.resumeCondition: After PPW review-gate framework (Milestone 19) and child-repo records are linked by provenance

reviewLimitations.limitation: Reliability sampling design for v4 corpus not yet adapted to PPW framework
reviewLimitations.impact: New corpus tiers (validation, reference) have no PPW reliability plan yet

reviewLimitations.limitation: Third-party corpus texts (scholarly commentary, translations) have not been individually rights-reviewed
reviewLimitations.impact: These texts are reference-only until rights are confirmed; import blocked
reviewLimitations.resumeCondition: Rights review for each third-party text; update import-map.json disposition accordingly
